---
title: Jinrui Du
image: profile1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/SantiDu
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/santi_du
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/santidu
---

I am Jin, MSc student in Statistics and Data Science, C++ programmer, 

also an amateur ballet dancer, singer, calisthenics disciple. I have a book list.

The profile picture is AI-enhanced. I have never been that good looking.
